Module dev.chojo.aether.supporter

module dev.chojo.aether.supporter

  • Packages

    Exports
    Package
    Description
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.access
    Classes for managing user subscriptions and access levels.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration
    General configuration for the supporter module.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules
    Sub-modules for specific supporter configurations.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.dummy
    Dummy configuration classes for testing or placeholders.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.feature
    Configuration for feature-based access control.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.subscriptions
    Configuration related to subscription keys and management.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.subscriptions.platform
    Platform-specific subscription configurations.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.modules.subscriptions.platform.purchase
    Data structures for platform-specific purchases.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.jackson
    Jackson-specific configuration and modules for serialization.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.registry
    Registry for managing supporter-related keys and services.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.service
    Core services for supporter management and middleware.
    dev.chojo.aether.supporter.service.context
    Context and validation classes for supporter access checks.
